topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

options: She has been working for two hours.
I am eating food right now.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं रोज़ चावल खाता हूँ।" = "I eat rice every day."
Full sentence: "I am eating food right now."
Correct sentence: "I have eaten food."

questions.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।
options: She goes to work every day.
I have been studying for an hour.
questions.answer: I have been studying for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।" = "I have been studying for an hour."
Full sentence: "She goes to work every day."
Correct sentence: "She is working right now."

questions.hindi: उसने अपना काम पूरा कर लिया है।
options: She has been working for two hours.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने अपना काम पूरा कर लिया है।" = "She has finished her work."

questions.sentence: She has been _____ for two hours.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She has been working for two hours."

questions.sentence: They go to school every day yesterday.
options: They go to school every day yesterday.
They go to school every day.
questions.answer: They go to school every day.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They go to school every day."

options: I have been studying for an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वे अभी खेल रहे हैं।" = "They are playing now."
Full sentence: "They have done their homework."

questions.sentence: They have been playing since morning yesterday.
options: They have been playing since morning yesterday.
They have been playing since morning.
questions.answer: They have been playing since morning.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They have been playing since morning."

questions.hindi: मैं हर सुबह exercise करता हूँ।
options: He has been singing for half an hour.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं हर सुबह exercise करता हूँ।" = "I exercise every morning."
Full sentence: "I am reading now."

questions.sentence: I have read this book yesterday.
options: I have read this book yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have read this book."

questions.hindi: मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ।
options: I have been reading this book for three hours.
questions.answer: I have been reading this book for three hours.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ।" = "I have been reading this book for three hours."
Full sentence: "He sings well."
Correct sentence: "He is singing now."

questions.hindi: उसने एक नया गाना गाया है।
options: He has been singing for half an hour.
He has sung a new song.
questions.answer: He has sung a new song.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने एक नया गाना गाया है।" = "He has sung a new song."

questions.sentence: He has been singing _____ half an hour.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "He has been singing for half an hour."
